calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INS. CO.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ROBERT TORRENCE JR., aka ROBERT TORRENCE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $61,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,084.68
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $507.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $63,092.18
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Continued To Aug-06-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
